title: North Stonington Elementary School ransomware incident

extortion.description: North Stonington Public Schools have two public schools and 736 students, strives to create a safe environment for themselves, their school, and their students. However, their "Safety First" slogan has recently changed! Despite having extensive resources and support, North Stonington Public Schools has a very poor IT security team that is doing a poor job! With our help, over 3 TB of confidential data was exposed, meaning all student data, including the entire history and documentation, is now in our hands!
